title: Marco Paul 150ml Luxury Oud & Bergamot Scented Candle & Reed Diffuser Gift Set – Fluted Room Diffuser with Ribbed Candle Jars Home Air Freshener Essential Oil Diffuser Fragrance For Men and Women
features: Specifications: 150ml Diffuser with an estimated 4-6 week use, 100g Candle 8x7cm with an estimated 18 hour burn time. This Marco Paul reed diffuser and candle set includes a fragrance diffuser with diffuser reeds plus a stylish ribbed glass candle (8cm tall x 7cm wide). Compact yet effective, it’s ideal as a bedroom air freshener, bathroom air freshener, or stylish living room decor, blending seamlessly into any home interior.

Premium Materials: Crafted with durable, ribbed glass jars and sturdy diffuser sticks, this set is designed to last. The diffuser reeds absorb and disperse fragrance oil evenly, creating a robust and long-lasting scent diffuser for up to 6 weeks. Built with premium quality, this candle and reed diffuser set makes a hardwearing addition to your home decor.

Oud & Bergamot Fragrance – Enjoy the unique blend of deep, smoky oud paired with the fresh, citrus notes of bergamot. This combination creates a sophisticated, modern scent diffuser, it adds an uplifting yet luxurious touch to your home. The oud notes evoke luxury and mystery, intertwined with bergamot, providing comeplex floral notes, adding a refreshing, radiant, and energizing effect this gift set.

Long-Lasting Aroma: Designed for everyday living, this reed diffuser oil and scented candle provide hours of fragrance. Perfect for use as bathroom air freshener, room air freshener, or living room decor, it’s a practical yet premium addition to your Christmas homeware, wedding gift, or engagement gifts.

Perfect Gift for Christmas & All Occasions: Presented in a luxury candle gift box, this set makes an elegant Christmas gift for women, men’s gifts, mothers birthday gifts, or birthday gifts for men. A thoughtful stocking filler, small gift for women, or gift set for men, it’s perfect for seasonal presents, or home decoration.
description: Product description Bring warmth, style and fragrance to your home this season with the Marco Paul Oud & Bergamot Reed Diffuser & Candle Gift Set. Beautifully presented in a luxury striped gift box, this elegant set combines timeless design with long-lasting aroma – making it the perfect choice for Christmas gifts, birthday presents, or stylish home decoration. The set includes a 150ml reed diffuser complete with high-quality diffuser reeds and a matching 100g ribbed glass scented candle jar. Designed to complement any home, both pieces feature durable glass with a premium ribbed finish, creating a decorative touch for your living room, bedroom, or bathroom. Infused with the rich notes of Oud & Bergamot, this scent diffuser offers a deep, woody warmth of oud with the fresh, zesty brightness of bergamot. – a scent that feels cosy, sophisticated, and perfect for winter evenings. Ideal as a bedroom air freshener, bathroom air freshener, or room diffuser, it transforms everyday spaces into relaxing retreats. This candle gift set is more than just home fragrance – it’s a thoughtful way to treat loved ones. Whether you’re searching for Christmas gifts for women, birthday gifts for men, stocking fillers, wedding or engagement gifts, or stylish gift sets for women and men, this versatile set is a perfect fit. Durable, elegant, and practical, the Marco Paul reed diffuser and candle set is a premium choice for homeware, seasonal presents, and long-lasting fragrance. Add it to your own home for a touch of everyday luxury, or gift it to someone special this festive season. Directions Add fragrance oil to the diffuser bottle, then insert the reeds. Replace the reeds every 2-3 weeks for optimal fragrance. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
